title: Seed to Series A Transition
description: Strategic outreach focused on quota methodology for scaling teams.

sequences.subject: Quick question on your quota set-up
sequences.content: Hi {{name}}, noticed {{company}} is scaling rapidly. Are your reps clear on how their quotas were set? Most Series A teams we see have a visibility gap here...

title: Comp Health - Post-Churn
description: Targeting accounts that recently lost key sales talent to competitors.

sequences.content: Saw the update about the team changes at {{company}}. Often this is a sign it's time to audit the current OTE framework. Would love to send you our latest diagnostic report.
